name: boltz-mcpb
description: Predict structures, screen molecules and proteins, and design binders.
long_description: Use Boltz from Claude Desktop for biomolecular modeling workflows: predict structure and binding for protein, RNA, DNA, and ligand complexes; rank small-molecule or protein libraries against targets; and design novel small molecules, peptides, antibodies, nanobodies, or custom protein binders with structures and confidence metrics.

tools.name: boltz_check_setup
tools.description: Check whether Boltz is ready to run jobs, including access, authentication, and output directory configuration.

tools.name: boltz_install_cli
tools.description: Install or update the local Boltz app components required to run workflows from Claude Desktop.

tools.name: boltz_auth_login
tools.description: Start Boltz sign-in and return the login instructions needed to connect your account.

tools.name: boltz_structure_and_binding
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one Boltz structure-and-binding job, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_small_molecule_screen
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one small-molecule library screen, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_small_molecule_design
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one small-molecule design job, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_protein_screen
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one protein-family screen, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_protein_design
tools.description: Estimate and optionally start one protein design job, then optionally launch result download.

tools.name: boltz_download_results
tools.description: Start or resume downloading results for an existing Boltz job.

tools.name: boltz_job_status
tools.description: Check Boltz job progress, local result download state, or recent downloader activity.

boltz_api_path.title: Boltz executable
boltz_api_path.description: Advanced: local Boltz runner to use.

output_root.title: Boltz output directory
output_root.description: Directory where downloaded Boltz run artifacts are stored.

api_key.title: Boltz API key
api_key.description: Optional API key fallback. Leave blank to sign in interactively.

default_poll_interval_seconds.title: Default download poll interval
default_poll_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between result-download status checks when a workflow does not specify one.
